title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1 (a reasoning model), Scout (an always-on agent), Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2 (a quantum chip). The announcement positions Microsoft as both an OpenAI partner and competitor by building a full-stack AI capability across models, agents, developer tools, and quantum hardware.
